scripts.build: cd frontend/authorities && npm install && npm run build && cd ../citizens && npm install && npm run build && cd ../.. && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/citizens && mkdir -p dist/admin && cp index.html dist/ && cp -r frontend/citizens/dist/* dist/citizens/ && cp -r frontend/authorities/dist/* dist/admin/ && rm -rf backend/src/main/resources/static && cp -r dist backend/src/main/resources/static
